productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Ambition VII Logo White Sports Shoes
description: For all you beginners in tennis, here's that iconic shoe from adidas that can help shape you into a winner. The Ambition VII Logo tennis shoe is a classic tough shoe that provides a timeless layout and absolute grip, allowing you to concentrate on the game with ease. Upper Synthetic leather upper engineered with adiTuff technology with perforations for absolute durability and breathable comfort Meshed and padded collar and tongue for enhanced breathability and snug, comfortable Fit Meshed and cushioned inner for absolute breathable comfort Lace-up system for a snug, customised fit Ergonomically curved and padded footbed for all-day comfort Midsole EVA injected insole that offers impact protection when hitting the ground at hard speeds Outsole Herringbone grooves for ease of movement and enhanced grip Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
